title: Phase 0: Core types, errors, and JSON helpers
description: Port all 72 types from reference/types.ts to src/types.rs with serde derives. Port error types to src/errors.rs using thiserror. Port JSON output envelope to src/json.rs. All types must round-trip through serde_json. Use #[serde(rename_all = camelCase)] for JSON compat. File scope: src/types.rs, src/errors.rs, src/json.rs
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/builder-types/grove-c146 (clean-merge)

title: Phase 0: YAML config loader
description: Port reference/config.ts to src/config.rs. Must: find .overstory/config.yaml by walking up from CWD, merge config.local.yaml if present, apply DEFAULT_CONFIG for missing fields, validate config values, support --project flag override. Handle git worktree detection for resolving project root. File scope: src/config.rs
closeReason: Config.rs integrated via fix-lead (grove-71cd). Original config-builder branch content extracted and adapted.

title: Phase 0: Database layer (5 stores)
description: Port all 5 database stores to src/db/. Includes: connection.rs (shared WAL opener), sessions.rs (SessionStore + RunStore), mail.rs (MailStore), events.rs (EventStore), metrics.rs (MetricsStore), merge_queue.rs (MergeQueue), and mod.rs. Each store creates tables idempotently, provides CRUD methods matching the TypeScript interfaces. All use rusqlite synchronously. Write unit tests with in-memory SQLite. File scope: src/db/mod.rs, src/db/connection.rs, src/db/sessions.rs, src/db/mail.rs, src/db/events.rs, src/db/metrics.rs, src/db/merge_queue.rs
closeReason: Database layer merged via db-integrate-builder (clean-merge). 7 db modules, 129 tests.

title: Phase 0: Logging, CLI skeleton with all 35 commands
description: Port reference/color.ts + reference/theme.ts to src/logging/mod.rs. Implement brand palette (BrandGreen #2e7d32, AccentAmber #ffb74d, MutedGray #78786e), print_success/error/warning/hint helpers, state colors/icons, format_duration, format_relative_time, strip_ansi, visible_length. Port CLI skeleton to src/main.rs with clap derive macros. All 35 commands as subcommands, each printing 'not yet implemented'. Global flags: --project, --quiet, --json, --verbose. grove --help must print all commands. File scope: src/logging/mod.rs, src/main.rs
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/phase0-builder/grove-8402 (auto-resolve)

title: Fix: revert bad config merge, integrate config.rs properly
description: CRITICAL FIX: The auto-resolve merge of overstory/config-builder/grove-c37a (commit bcf090e) displaced content from prior merges. types.rs dropped from 1413 to 495 lines, main.rs from 626 to 79 lines. Steps: (1) git revert bcf090e -m 1 to restore the types-lead and cli-lead content. (2) Extract ONLY src/config.rs from the config-builder branch (git show overstory/config-builder/grove-c37a:src/config.rs). (3) Add mod declarations to main.rs: mod types; mod errors; mod json; mod config; (these were lost in earlier auto-resolve). (4) The config.rs may reference types from its own types.rs — update imports to use crate::types and crate::errors instead. (5) Ensure cargo build compiles clean, cargo test passes, cargo clippy clean. File scope: src/main.rs, src/config.rs (and minor fixups to types.rs/errors.rs if config needs additional types not in the authoritative types.rs).
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/fix-builder/grove-71cd (clean-merge). Reverted bad auto-resolve, integrated config.rs properly.

title: Integrate database layer from db-builder branch
description: Extract the database layer files from overstory/db-builder/grove-3e48 branch and integrate with current main. The db-builder branch has its own types.rs/errors.rs/main.rs that will conflict with main. Steps: (1) Extract src/db/ directory files from db-builder branch: mod.rs, connection.rs, sessions.rs, mail.rs, events.rs, metrics.rs, merge_queue.rs. (2) Add 'mod db;' declaration to src/main.rs. (3) Adapt db modules to use crate::types and crate::errors from the authoritative versions on main. The db modules may need types that exist in db-builder's types.rs but not in main's — add any missing types. (4) Ensure cargo build, cargo test, cargo clippy all pass. File scope: src/db/*, src/main.rs, src/types.rs (additions only).
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/db-integrate-builder/grove-a60b (clean-merge). DB integration complete.

title: Phase 1: status + costs commands
description: Implement src/commands/status.rs and src/commands/costs.rs per docs/phase-1.md. Both are read-only commands querying sessions.db, mail.db, merge-queue.db, metrics.db. Must support --json output matching the spec schemas. Test against real .overstory/ data. Quality gates: cargo build, cargo test, cargo clippy -- -D warnings.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/status-costs-builder/grove-53e2

title: Phase 1: mail command (list/check/read)
description: Implement src/commands/mail.rs with 3 subcommands: list, check, read. Per docs/phase-1.md spec. Read-only commands querying mail.db. Support --json output, --inject format for check, filtering flags. Test against real .overstory/ mail.db data. Quality gates: cargo build, cargo test, cargo clippy -- -D warnings.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/mail-builder/grove-832b

title: Phase 1: doctor command + main.rs wiring + mod.rs
description: Implement src/commands/doctor.rs (system health checks per docs/phase-1.md), create src/commands/mod.rs exposing all command modules, and wire status/mail/costs/doctor into main.rs replacing not_yet_implemented stubs. Must update clap arg types for Doctor/Mail/Costs from PassthroughArgs to proper typed args. Quality gates: cargo build, cargo test, cargo clippy -- -D warnings.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/doctor-builder/grove-12d3

title: Fix merge artifacts: add missing DoctorArgs + mod.rs declarations
description: Auto-resolve merge dropped content. Fix: (1) Add DoctorArgs struct to main.rs (json: bool, verbose: bool, category: Option<String>). (2) Add 'pub mod doctor;' and 'pub mod mail;' to src/commands/mod.rs. Must pass cargo build, cargo test, cargo clippy -- -D warnings.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/fix-merge-builder/grove-045d

title: Phase 2: mail send/reply/purge write commands
description: Extend src/commands/mail.rs with send, reply, and purge subcommands. Add proper arg structs to main.rs replacing PassthroughArgs for Send/Reply/Purge. Reference: reference/mail-command.ts. See docs/phase-2.md deliverable 1.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/mail-write-builder/grove-301f

title: Phase 2: merge command + resolver with content-displacement detection
description: Implement grove merge command and the merge resolver. New files: src/merge/mod.rs, src/merge/resolver.rs, src/commands/merge.rs. Add MergeOutcome, DisplacedHunk, ConflictResolution types to src/types.rs. Implements tiers 1-2 (clean merge + auto-resolve with ContentDisplaced detection). Reference: reference/merge-resolver.ts (1125 lines). See docs/phase-2.md deliverable 5. Wire merge command in main.rs.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/merge-builder/grove-1159

title: Phase 2: clean, stop, nudge, init, hooks, spec commands
description: Implement 6 new command modules: clean.rs, stop.rs, nudge.rs, init.rs, hooks.rs, spec.rs. Register in commands/mod.rs and wire in main.rs. Reference files in reference/. See docs/phase-2.md deliverables 2-4, 6-8.
closeReason: Merged branches overstory/scaffold-cmds-builder/grove-ec38 and overstory/system-cmds-builder/grove-ec38

title: Phase 2: fix-up merge artifacts on shared files
description: After merging the 3 parallel Phase 2 leads, fix any merge artifacts on shared files (main.rs, commands/mod.rs, types.rs). Verify cargo build, cargo test, cargo clippy all pass. This is a sequenced task — only start after the other 3 Phase 2 branches are merged.
closeReason: Fixed merge artifacts: wired 6 dropped command modules (clean, hooks, init, nudge, spec, stop) in mod.rs and main.rs with proper arg structs and routing. Fixed 3 pre-existing clippy errors in init.rs. All quality gates pass (247 tests, clean clippy).

title: Phase 3: Worktree + Tmux module
description: Implement src/worktree/mod.rs, git.rs, tmux.rs. Git worktree operations (create, remove, list, prune, delete_branch) via std::process::Command. Tmux operations (create/kill session, send keys, capture pane, list sessions). Reference: reference/worktree-manager.ts, reference/tmux.ts. See docs/phase-3.md deliverable 1.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/worktree-builder/grove-b67c

title: Phase 3: Process management module
description: Implement src/process/mod.rs, spawn.rs, monitor.rs. NEW — not in overstory. ManagedProcess struct with tokio child process, spawn_headless async fn, is_process_alive, kill_process. Monitor: parse NDJSON from agent stdout, AgentOutcome enum, budget circuit breaker. See docs/phase-3.md deliverable 2.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/process-builder/grove-ccba

title: Phase 3: Agents + Runtimes modules
description: Implement src/agents/ (overlay.rs, manifest.rs, mod.rs) and src/runtimes/ (mod.rs, claude.rs, registry.rs). Overlay: read templates/overlay.md.tmpl, replace {{VARIABLE}} placeholders, write to worktree. Manifest: parse .overstory/agent-manifest.json. Runtime trait: AgentRuntime with id, instruction_path, is_headless, build_headless_command, build_interactive_command, deploy_config, detect_ready, build_env. Claude impl + stub impls for codex/gemini/pi/copilot/sapling/opencode. Registry: get_runtime, resolve_runtime. Reference: reference/sling.ts. See docs/phase-3.md deliverables 3-5.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/agents-runtimes-builder/grove-e0f9

title: Phase 3: Sling + Log + Watchdog + Wiring
description: Implement src/commands/sling.rs (the hub — load config, validate, create worktree, build overlay, get runtime, deploy, register session, spawn headless or tmux, monitor), src/commands/log.rs (session-start/session-end lifecycle hooks), src/watchdog/mod.rs (health poll loop, stale/zombie detection, auto-nudge/kill). Wire all new commands in main.rs and commands/mod.rs. Reference: reference/sling.ts, docs/phase-3.md deliverables 6-8. DEPENDS ON: worktree, process, agents, runtimes modules being merged first.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/sling-builder/grove-f95b

title: Phase 4A-1: agents, worktree, group, run commands
description: Implement 4 commands: grove agents (list agent definitions from manifest), grove worktree list/clean (enumerate worktrees, clean completed), grove group list/create/add/status/close (groups.json management), grove run list/show (query runs table). All support --json. New files: src/commands/agents.rs, src/commands/worktree.rs, src/commands/group.rs, src/commands/run.rs. Wire into mod.rs and main.rs. See docs/phase-4.md Part A sections 1-4.
closeReason: Implemented 4 commands: agents (discover), worktree (list/clean), group (create/status/add/remove/list), run (current/list/show/complete). 1633 lines across 6 files. Builder: phase4a1-builder. Quality gates passed (320 tests, clippy clean, build clean). merge_ready sent.

title: Phase 4A-2: feed, errors, inspect, trace commands
description: Implement 4 observability commands: grove feed (event stream with --follow polling), grove errors (aggregated errors from events.db), grove inspect (deep agent inspection combining sessions/events/mail/metrics), grove trace (chronological event timeline). All support --json. New files: src/commands/feed.rs, src/commands/errors.rs, src/commands/inspect.rs, src/commands/trace.rs. Wire into mod.rs and main.rs. See docs/phase-4.md Part A sections 5-8.
closeReason: Implemented 4 observability commands: feed (event stream with --follow polling), errors (error events grouped by agent), inspect (deep agent inspection across sessions/events/mail/metrics), trace (chronological timeline merging events and mail). 1015 lines, 312 tests pass.

title: Phase 4B: coordinator command + event loop
description: Implement grove coordinator start/stop/status/send. The coordinator is a native Rust event loop (NOT an LLM session). start: register session, create tmux session, run event loop (check mail, handle completions, check merge queue, evaluate exit triggers). stop: SIGTERM + update session. status: show coordinator info. send: insert message to coordinator mailbox. LLM only called for task decomposition (one-shot reqwest to Claude API). New files: src/commands/coordinator.rs, src/coordinator/mod.rs, src/coordinator/event_loop.rs, src/coordinator/planner.rs. Wire into mod.rs and main.rs. See docs/phase-4.md Part B.
closeReason: Implemented grove coordinator start/stop/status/send. 4 new files (src/commands/coordinator.rs, src/coordinator/mod.rs, src/coordinator/event_loop.rs, src/coordinator/planner.rs) + 2 modified (src/commands/mod.rs, src/main.rs). Event loop checks mail, completions, merge queue, exit triggers. Planner calls Claude API for task decomposition. 318 tests pass, clippy clean.

title: Phase 4 fixup: merge artifacts + main.rs wiring
description: After parallel leads merge, fix any merge artifacts in shared files (src/commands/mod.rs, src/main.rs). Ensure all 12 new commands are properly wired. Verify no not_yet_implemented stubs remain for Phase 4 commands. Run full verification commands from docs/phase-4.md.
closeReason: Phase 4 merge artifacts resolved. All commands wired in main.rs. 354 tests pass, cargo build clean.

title: Phase 4 bugfix: 6 bugs from integration testing
description: Fix 6 bugs per docs/phase-4-bugfix.md: BUG-1 coordinator exits immediately (has_received_work guard), BUG-2 agents reads sessions.db instead of manifest, BUG-3 group create requires issues, BUG-4 run list shows nothing, BUG-5 consequence of BUG-1, BUG-6 replace tmux coordinator with daemon mode. Files: src/coordinator/event_loop.rs, src/commands/agents.rs, src/commands/group.rs, src/commands/run.rs, src/commands/coordinator.rs, src/main.rs.
closeReason: Merged both builder branches: bugfix-cmds-builder (BUG-2,3,4) and bugfix-coord-builder (BUG-1,5,6). Clean merges, cargo build passes.

title: Phase 5: Query commands (logs, replay, metrics)
description: Implement grove logs, grove replay, and grove metrics commands. All read from events.db/metrics.db. See docs/phase-5.md sections 1-3. File scope: src/commands/logs.rs, src/commands/replay.rs, src/commands/metrics_cmd.rs. DO NOT modify mod.rs or main.rs — integration lead handles wiring.
closeReason: Implemented EventStore::query method, grove logs command (src/commands/logs.rs), and grove replay command (src/commands/replay.rs). All quality gates passed: 352 tests, clippy clean, cargo build clean.

title: Phase 5: Daemon commands (monitor, watch)
description: Implement grove monitor start/stop/status and grove watch commands. Both use PID file daemon pattern. See docs/phase-5.md sections 4-5. File scope: src/commands/monitor.rs, src/commands/watch_cmd.rs. DO NOT modify mod.rs or main.rs — integration lead handles wiring.
closeReason: Implemented src/commands/watch_cmd.rs: grove watch command with 3-mode pattern (one-shot, --background daemon, --foreground loop), execute_stop, execute_status, 11 tests. All 354 existing tests pass, clippy clean.

title: Phase 5: Info commands (prime, ecosystem, supervisor)
description: Implement grove prime, grove ecosystem, and grove supervisor (deprecated stub). See docs/phase-5.md sections 6-8. File scope: src/commands/prime.rs, src/commands/ecosystem.rs. Supervisor is just a deprecation message in main.rs dispatch. DO NOT modify mod.rs or main.rs — integration lead handles wiring.
closeReason: Implemented grove prime (context loading, orchestrator + agent mode, --json, --compact, --agent) and grove ecosystem (os-eco tool detection with versions, doctor summary, --json). 2 files: prime.rs (356 lines), ecosystem.rs (317 lines). All quality gates pass.

title: Phase 5: Integration — wire mod.rs + main.rs
description: After query/daemon/info leads merge: register all new modules in src/commands/mod.rs, wire execute calls in src/main.rs, remove not_yet_implemented stubs for Phase 5 commands. Run cargo build + cargo test + cargo clippy to verify. File scope: src/commands/mod.rs, src/main.rs. BLOCKED on other 3 Phase 5 issues merging first.
